metadata.title: Stop Watching AI Slop Build These Projects Instead
metadata.description:
If your feed looks anything like mine right now, it is full of AI content. And a lot of it is the same thing recycled over and over with a new thumbnail.
So here's what I'd actually build instead of watching another top 10 AI tools video:

Build a personal finance tracker that reads your actual statements and automatically categorizes your spending. You'll use it every month.
Build an email agent that triages your inbox and drafts responses for the ones that follow a pattern. You'll feel the time savings immediately.
Build a research tool that takes a topic, pulls sources, and gives you a summary you can actually trust. Every time you need to learn something new, it's already there.

The difference between people who are getting better at AI and people who just know a lot about AI is the building. That's it. That's the whole gap.

Pick one. Start today.
